Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bloodspawn]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — bloodspawn can be created from human injuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — some bloodspawn have bodies that appear to have a skeleton of wood underneath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — certain bloodspawn explode into branches of crimson vines covered in scarlet leaves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — There are hundreds of bloodspawn at ground level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Bloodspawn can ruin towns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Bloodspawn are part of the Phoenix's power and hatch from blood when the Dreadgod wakes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — The bloodspawn originated from a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Bloodspawn have ravaged Arelius homes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — a pair of bloodspawn formed beneath him in midair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Bloodspawn are composed of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Bloodspawn can burst into thorns when approached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Bloodspawn can perform suicide attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — A bloodspawn slammed on the door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Bloodspawn are creatures that explode upon death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Bloodspawn are appearing overhead in increasing numbers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Bloodspawn are creatures that can slither through gaps in webs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Bloodspawn vanished once the red aura withdrew.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy and Renfei fought against the bloodspawn.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Bloodspawn can tear apart refugees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Bloodspawn rise wherever blood drips from the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Bloodspawn are creatures that can emerge from bandages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Bloodspawn had risen on the cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Bloodspawn are creatures that rise from red trails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Bloodspawn are creatures characterized by malicious hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Bloodspawn can be shaped like humans with swords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Some bloodspawn have flourishing tree branches for limbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Bloodspawn are creatures that can be torn to essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos eliminates bloodspawn.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Bloodspawn are creatures that grow from blood and eat madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Bloodspawn are described as crawling over a mountain like ants.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Bloodspawn roam in packs and hunt resistance.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
